title: Data Engineer
jobDescription:
Job Title: Data Engineer Azure Data Engineering & Databricks

Experience: 4–7 Years


Role Summary:

We are looking for a skilled Data Engineer with solid experience in the Azure data ecosystem and hands-on expertise in Azure Databricks. The ideal candidate will have worked on designing and developing scalable, cloud-native data pipelines and solutions using Azure data services. You will contribute to building and optimizing data lakehouse and warehouse architectures, enabling efficient data ingestion, transformation, and analytics in a collaborative team environment.


Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines and workflows using Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse Analytics, and Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS).
  • Implement ETL/ELT processes using Azure Data Factory and Databricks to enable efficient data ingestion and transformation.
  • Work on building data solutions leveraging Delta Lake and implement best practices such as the Medallion Architecture.
  • Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand data requirements and deliver effective Azure-based data solutions.
  • Participate in code reviews, testing, deployment, and documentation to ensure high-quality data engineering deliverables.
  • Follow data governance, security, and compliance standards while handling data pipelines and sensitive information.
  • Implement and manage secure authentication and authorization using Azure Active Directory (AAD) and Azure Key Vault for secrets management.
  • Support CI/CD automation and monitoring of data pipelines using Azure DevOps.
  • Stay current with Azure data platform developments and contribute ideas to improve existing data infrastructure and processes.

Must-Have Skills:

  • 4+ years of experience in data engineering with a strong focus on Azure data services.
  • Hands-on experience with Azure Databricks, Spark, PySpark, Delta Lake, and implementing Medallion Architecture is highly desirable.
  • Proficiency with Azure Data Factory for building ETL/ELT pipelines.
  • Working knowledge of Azure Synapse Analytics and Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS).
  • Strong programming skills in Python and SQL (T-SQL). PowerShell experience is a plus.
  • Experience with Azure Active Directory (AAD) for authentication and role-based access control.
  • Familiarity with Azure Key Vault for secrets and certificate management.
  • Understanding of modern data lakehouse architectures and cloud-native data platform principles on Azure.
  • Basic knowledge of CI/CD and DevOps processes, preferably using Azure DevOps.
  • Good communication skills with the ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams.

Good-to-Have Skills:

  • Experience with Delta Live Tables, MLflow, or Unity Catalog on Azure Databricks.
  • Familiarity with Azure Event Hubs, Azure Stream Analytics, or other streaming data services.
  • Awareness of Azure Purview or other data governance tools.
  • Basic exposure to Snowflake in an Azure environment, including data modeling and performance tuning.
  • Experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like ARM templates or Terraform on Azure.
  • Understanding of machine learning workflows and MLOps integration within Azure.

title: Google Cloud Engineer
jobDescription:
Overview of 66degrees

66degrees is a leading consulting and professional services company specializing in developing Al-focused, data-led solutions leveraging the latest advancements in cloud technology. With our unmatched engineering capabilities and vast industry experience, we help the world's leading brands transform their business challenges into opportunities and shape the future of work. At 66degrees, we believe in embracing the challenge and winning together. These values not only guide us in achieving our goals as a company but also for our people. We are dedicated to creating a significant impact for our employees by fostering a culture that sparks innovation and supports professional and personal growth along the way.


Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Google Cloud and Workspace Engineer/Administrator to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for the comprehensive management and administration of all Google products, projects, sandboxes, and related infrastructure within the Google Cloud Platform (GCP), alongside the administration of Google Workspace. You will play a crucial role in ensuring the stability, security, and optimal performance of our cloud and collaboration environments.


Key Responsibilities:

Google Cloud Platform Administration:

  • Manage and administer Google Cloud projects, including creation, configuration, and resource allocation.
  • Oversee the deployment, monitoring, and maintenance of various Google Cloud services (e.g., Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL, BigQuery, Kubernetes Engine).
  • Implement and enforce security best practices within GCP, including IAM, network security, and data encryption.
  • Monitor cloud resource usage, identify cost optimization opportunities, and implement efficiency improvements.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve cloud infrastructure issues in a timely manner.

Google Workspace Administration:

  • Administer and support Google Workspace services, including Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Meet, and Chat.
  • Manage user accounts, groups, organizational units, and access permissions within Google Workspace.
  • Implement and enforce security and compliance policies for Google Workspace.
  • Provide technical support and guidance to users on Google Workspace features and best practices.
  • Monitor Google Workspace usage and identify opportunities for optimization.

Cloud adoption strategy:

  • The ability to align the SLZ deployment with the larger Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) and a clear business case for moving workloads to a sovereign cloud environment.
  • Manage the overall setup and configuration of SLZ

Product and Sandbox Management:

  • Administer and support various Google products and applications integrated with GCP and Google Workspace.
  • Manage and maintain sandbox environments for development, testing, and experimentation.
  • Ensure proper access control and resource allocation for sandbox users.

Automation and Scripting:

  • Develop and implement automation scripts (e.g., Python, Bash, Terraform) for routine cloud and Workspace operations and infrastructure provisioning.
  • Utilize Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles to manage and deploy cloud resources.

Monitoring and Alerting:

  • Set up and manage monitoring tools and dashboards for cloud infrastructure and applications, as well as Google Workspace.
  • Configure alerts and notifications for critical events and performance thresholds.

Network Segmentation:

  • Implement strong network segmentation using VPCs, subnets, and firewall rules to isolate different environments (e.g., production, development, staging) and workloads within the SLZ.

Identity and Access Management (IAM):

  • Establish a robust IAM strategy with granular permissions, principle of least privilege, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all access to the SLZ, leveraging Google Cloud IAM roles and custom roles as needed.

Logging and Monitoring:

  • Configure comprehensive logging and monitoring capabilities using Cloud Logging and Cloud Monitoring to capture all activities, security events, and resource utilization within the SLZ, enabling proactive threat detection and compliance auditing.

Security Services Integration:

  • Integrate native Google Cloud security services such as Security Command Center, Cloud Armor, and Cloud IDS/IPS to enhance threat protection, vulnerability management, and real-time anomaly detection within the SLZ.

Documentation:

  • Create and maintain comprehensive documentation for cloud and Workspace architecture, configurations, and operational procedures.

Collaboration:

  • Collaborate with development, operations, and security teams to ensure seamless integration and support of cloud and collaboration solutions.
  • Provide technical guidance and support to internal teams on GCP and Google Workspace best practices.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
  • Proven experience as a Google Cloud Engineer/Administrator or similar role.
  • Proven experience in administering Google Workspace.
  • Proven experience in establishing, maintaining, and managing Google Cloud billing accounts,cloud spends and overall financials ensuring strict adherence to financial policies and regulatory requirements.
  • In-depth knowledge of Google Cloud Platform services and architecture.
  • Strong understanding of networking concepts (VPC, VPN, Load Balancing) in a cloud environment.
  • Experience with identity and access management (IAM) in GCP and user management in Google Workspace.
  • Proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash)
  • Proficiency in executing the core Terraform workflow
  • Expertise in managing Terraform state, including local and remote backends, state locking, and handling sensitive data.
  • Experience with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps principles.
  • Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Google Cloud certification (e.g., Professional Cloud Architect, Professional Cloud Engineer).
  • Google Workspace certification (e.g., Google Workspace Administrator).
  • Experience with hybrid cloud environments.
  • Knowledge of database administration on GCP (e.g., Cloud SQL, Cloud Spanner).
  • Experience with big data technologies on GCP (e.g., BigQuery, Dataflow).

66degrees is an Equal Opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to actual or perceived race, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, national origin, age, weight, height, marital status, sexual orientation, veteran status, disability status or other legally protected class.

title: Principal Software Engineer (Node.JS)
jobDescription:
Position Overview - 

We are looking for a highly skilled computer programmer who is comfortable with both frontend and back-end programming. Principal Software Engineer are responsible for developing and designing front end web architecture, ensuring the responsiveness of applications, and working alongside graphic  designers for web design features, among other duties. Principal Software Engineer will be required to see  out a project from conception to the final product, requiring good organizational skills and attention to detail.

Company 

Provakil is a new-age legal operations management suite for enterprises. Provakil provides an integrated SaaS platform for legal teams to manage all aspects of legal operations including litigation, contracts, compliances, and intellectual property with customized workflows and analytics. We provide automatic data updates from 8000+ courts, trademark and patent registries, and other sources of public legal data. The platform is equipped with advanced ML/AI capabilities for intelligent document review, IP watch & search, case law research, and other use cases. Provakil is trusted by over 100 companies and 50 law firms to manage different aspects of their legal operations.


Why join us? 

Fast Growing 

We are a fast-growing organization with a 300% Y-o-Y growth in customers and revenue. We believe in setting expectations really high and stretching ourselves to deliver on it! 

Scale 

If you like to solve problems of scale, the legal industry has tremendous volumes of data to work with. We are building a unique data-driven solution to simplify legal operations for large enterprises. Our systems currently process over 12.5k transactions every minute, a metric that will multiply as we scale to new geographies. 

Team 

We are a team with a strong background and believe in working hard to build a reputation. The founding team consists of engineers from IIT and a lawyer with a practice in the Supreme Court. Our App store rating is 4.6 and our customers cant stop talking about us! 

Awards & Recognitions

title: Lead AI Engineer
jobDescription:
Position: Senior AI Engineer

Experience Required: 5+ Years

Company: Academian (EdTech Domain)

Work Location: Pune

Notice Period: we are looking for Immediate - 30 days NP (Candidate having 60 days Notice Period will not be considered)


Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Senior AI Engineer to spearhead the development and deployment of cutting-edge AI solutions. The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in AI algorithms, hands-on expertise with machine learning and deep learning frameworks, and a forward-thinking approach to leveraging emerging AI technologies like AGENTIC AI, RAG, Graph Databases, and open-source LLMs. This role also involves guiding the team to deliver scalable, efficient, and impactful AI products aligned with the EdTech domain.


Key Responsibilities:


  • AI Model Development: Design, train, and deploy AI models for diverse use cases, including:
  • Computer Vision: Image recognition, object detection, segmentation etc.
  • Natural Language Processing (NLP): Text classification, summarization, question-answering systems etc.
  • Generative AI: Fine-tuning and deploying open-source large language models (LLMs) and Private Models.
  • RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation): Implement AI systems combining retrieval with generative models.
  • Optimize AI models for performance, scalability, and accuracy using core algorithms (regression, KNN, SVM, etc.).
  • Open-Source LLM Development:
  • Develop and fine-tune open-source LLMs to cater to domain-specific needs.
  • Deploy open-source LLMs effectively in production environments, ensuring scalability and low latency.
  • Explore and implement open-source tools and frameworks like Hugging Face, LangChain, and Transformer libraries.
  • Integration & Architecture:
  • Integrate AI solutions with Vector/Graph db for advanced data relationships and queries.
  • Implement and manage MLOps/LLMOps pipelines for efficient deployment, monitoring, and scaling of AI models.
  • Leadership:
  • Mentor and guide junior engineers, fostering innovation and skill development.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product management, data engineering, and software development, to align AI strategies with business goals.
  • Infrastructure:
  • Leverage cloud AI platforms (AWS SageMaker, Google Vertex AI, Azure AI) for scalable solutions.
  • Adopt open-source frameworks and tools (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face) for experimentation and development.
  • Best Practices:
  • Establish robust practices for coding, testing, and documenting AI solutions.
  • Stay at the forefront of AI research and emerging trends like AGENTIC AI, RAG, and open-source LLM development.

Requirements:


Experience

  • 5+ years of experience in AI/ML
  • Proven expertise in designing and deploying AI solutions in production environments.

Technical Skills

  • Strong proficiency in machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn).
  • Hands-on experience with tools like Hugging Face, OpenAI API, and Google AI tools.

jobDescription:
Senior Java Developer Java, Microservices

About the Role

We build systems that power millions of customer journeys every day — online and in-store.

We’re looking for an experienced Senior Java Developer with 6–10 years of solid experience

designing and developing high-performance Microservices using Spring Boot and Spring

WebFlux. If you’re passionate about building scalable solutions, love solving complex

problems, and thrive in a collaborative, agile environment — come build what’s next with

us!

What You’ll Do

  • Design, develop, and deploy robust, scalable Microservices using Spring Boot and

Spring WebFlux, while adhering to modern security and coding best practices.

  • Apply strong knowledge of design patterns, data structures, algorithms, and SOLID

principles to deliver high-quality, maintainable code.

  • Work closely with DevOps, QA, and product teams to ensure that solutions meet

business requirements and are reliable in production.

  • Participate in product demos, design discussions, and release reviews, bringing your

technical expertise to shape our products.

  • Continuously improve development processes and engineering practices, sharing

knowledge and mentoring others.

  • Stay up to date with the latest tools, technologies, and frameworks in the Java and

cloud-native ecosystem.

  • Deploy, monitor, and maintain services on Kubernetes (AKS) and leverage

containerization best practices with Docker.

  • Design and work with both NoSQL (Couchbase, MongoDB, Cassandra) and SQL

(PostgreSQL) databases to build efficient, performant services.

  • Leverage cloud-native capabilities in AWS or Azure to deliver resilient, scalable

services.

  • Follow Agile best practices, using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Sonar,

Snyk, Postman, and more to ensure quality and security.

What We’re Looking For

Must-Have:

  • Strong knowledge of design patterns, data structures, algorithms, and SOLID

principles.

  • Excellent hands-on experience with Java 8, Java 17 (and above).
  • Deep practical experience with Microservices architecture, Spring Boot, and Spring

WebFlux.

  • Solid working experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and Azure Kubernetes Service

(AKS).

  • Strong proficiency with NoSQL databases (Couchbase, MongoDB, Cassandra) and

SQL databases (PostgreSQL).

  • Proven experience building and deploying cloud-native solutions on AWS and/or

Azure.

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Effective communication skills and the ability to collaborate with cross-functional

teams.

Other Skills:

  • CI/CD tools: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD
  • Security and quality tools: Snyk, Sonar
  • API Testing: Postman
  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies and best practices.

Nice-to-Have:

  • Experience with Splunk, ELK Stack for log monitoring.
  • Experience with NewRelic, AppDynamics, or DynaTrace for application performance

monitoring.

About Lucio:
We're an AI product company that wants to transform the legal industry using generative AI. We're a rapidly growing team with a truly innovative product that is already being used at many top law firms in the country.

We're building a team of talented developers who are passionate about building products that solve real-world problems. With us, you'll have the opportunity to work on everything from fine-tuning LLMs, creating complex data processing pipelines, optimizing distributed services and more. Don't worry, you won't have to do everything, but you'll always have the option of working on something exciting and new.

We're looking to hire a talented Frontend Engineer who is passionate about building beautiful interfaces and new user experiences. You will excel at this role if you:

  • Have an eye for detail
  • Love creating and thinking of new user flows and experiences
  • Want to help build delightful products

Must-Have Skills (Essential):

  • Strong Proficiency in Core Web Technologies:
  • JavaScript (ES6+): Deep understanding of core JavaScript concepts, asynchronous programming (Promises, async/await), and modern language features.
  • CSS3: Excellent understanding of CSS fundamentals, layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), responsive design principles, and CSS preprocessors (like Sass or Less, though Tailwind is a separate "Good to Have").
  • React: Solid experience building complex user interfaces with React, including component lifecycle, hooks, state management (even if not a preferred library initially), and routing.
  • UI Design Systems/Component Libraries: Demonstrated experience working with at least one major UI Design System/Component Library. MUI (Preferred) is a significant plus. Familiarity with AntD, Chakra UI, or Mantine is also valuable.
  • State Management: Practical experience with at least one client-side state management library. Redux Toolkit or Zustand (Preferred) indicates a good understanding of managing application state effectively.
  • Server-Side State Management/Data Fetching: Experience with a server-side state management/data fetching library like SWR, React Query (Tanstack Query) (Preferred), or RTK Query is highly desirable, showcasing knowledge of efficient data handling.
  • Form Handling and Validation:
  • Experience with form handling in React and implementing robust validation.
  • Familiarity with react-hook-form (preferred) for form management.
  • Knowledge of zod (preferred) or yup for schema definition and validation.
  • Performance Optimization: Proven ability to identify and implement performance optimizations in frontend applications. This includes techniques like code splitting, lazy loading, memoization, efficient rendering, and optimizing API calls.
  • Good Code Practices: Strong understanding of clean code principles, writing maintainable and scalable code, following coding standards, and using linting and formatting tools (e.g., ESLint, Prettier).
  • Version Control (Git): Proficient in using Git for version control, branching strategies, and collaborating with a team.
  • Understanding of Web Development Fundamentals: Knowledge of HTTP protocols, RESTful APIs, and browser developer tools.

Good to Have Skills (Beneficial):

  • Next.js or React Router (Remix): Production experience with these frameworks is a significant plus, indicating familiarity with server-side rendering (SSR), static site generation (SSG), and their respective feature sets.
  • Tailwind CSS: Experience with utility-first CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS can be beneficial for rapid styling and consistency.
  • Node.js and Express.js: Basic understanding or prior experience with Node.js and Express.js for backend development can be a valuable asset for understanding the full-stack picture and potentially contributing to API integrations or basic backend tasks.
  • Build Tools: Familiarity with build tools like Webpack, Parcel, or Vite.
  • Accessibility (A11y): Awareness of and ability to implement accessible web applications (following WCAG guidelines).

We're looking for candidates with 5 to 8 years experience, either through great independent projects or working with companies. You don't necessarily need a degree in CS as long as you have the right skillset.

title: Senior Devops Engineer
jobDescription:
An esteemed client of Tekminders is seeking a highly skilled DevOps Engineer to join our growing Operations team. You will design, implement, and maintain scalable, secure, and automated cloud-based infrastructure using AWS and modern DevOps practices. Collaborating closely with engineers, architects, and security professionals, youll be instrumental in building reliable deployment pipelines and ensuring system uptime for our SaaS solutions. Will work US CST hrs. Works hrs will be from 5 PM to 2 AM IST to be able to work with CST and PST timezones.


Please apply only if you can join immediately.


Role & responsibilities


  • Ensure the availability, performance, stability, security, and scalability of our AWS-based production systems.
  • Design, implement and maintain automated solutions for deploying, monitoring, and maintaining all environments for our SaaS product suite.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve issues within our cloud-based infrastructure in a timely manner.
  • Work with the DevOps Manager to prioritize system reliability and automation improvements and to define and implement DevOps best practices.
  • Collaborate effectively with other DevOps and Product Engineers using clear written and verbal communications.
  • Attend regular Operations and (as needed) Product Engineering meetings to support cross-team alignment
  • Assist in the planning, implementation, and testing of Business Continuity and Incident Response Plans
  • Participate in rotating on-call schedule to ensure smooth operations

Preferred candidate profile


  • 5+ years of experience in DevOps, SRE, or related roles
  • Demonstrated competency and experience with the following AWS services: EKS, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, ECR, IAM, and SQS.
  • Demonstrated competency and experience in one or more IaC management platforms (e.g., Terraform Cloud, AWS CloudFormation, Ansible)
  • Deep understanding of Kubernetes architecture and operations in production environments.
  • Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as GitHub Actions or GitLab CI.
  • Solid understanding of networking and security best practices
  • Solid understanding of observability best practices and tools (e.g., Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana)
  • Experience with scripting languages like Bash and Python.
  • Excellent communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.

Preferred Skills

  • Strong understanding of how to secure AWS environments and meet compliance requirements.
  • Experience working in regulated or high-security environments.
  • Experience with Flux for GitOps-based Kubernetes deployment workflows.
  • Proficiency in Helm for managing Kubernetes packages.
  • Strong skills in Ansible for configuration management and automation.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
jobDescription:
Job Title: Machine Learning Advisor

Location: Remote
Position Type: Part-Time (20 hours/week)
Experience Level: Senior (8 to 10+ years)


About the Role:


We are looking for a hands-on Machine Learning Advisor who can both build initial models and mentor our junior engineers as they refine and productionize them. This is a part-time role designed for a senior professional who enjoys rolling up their sleeves to prototype and code, while also providing strategic guidance, architecture oversight, and mentorship.You will help us establish a solid ML foundation by:

  • Building and validating the first versions of our models.
  • Setting up the right processes, frameworks, and best practices.
  • Working closely with junior team members to fine-tune, scale, and optimize models.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a builder + advisor hybrid capacity, balancing hands-on contributions with leadership and mentorship.

Key Responsibilities

  • Hands-On Model Development
    • Design and build the initial versions of ML models (regression, classification, clustering, or deep learning, depending on problem type).
    • Perform feature engineering, experimentation, and hyperparameter tuning.
    • Develop clean, scalable code for model training and inference.

  • Mentorship & Refinement
    • Work with junior ML engineers to iterate, refine, and fine-tune models.
    • Review their code, guide debugging, and introduce advanced techniques.
    • Transfer knowledge and upskill the team for long-term ownership.

  • Architecture & Best Practices
    • Define the ML project workflow (from data prep to deployment).
    • Set up reproducibility, versioning, and experiment tracking.
    • Recommend scalable approaches for data pipelines and model serving.

  • Collaboration
    • Partner with product and engineering to align ML solutions with business needs.
    • Communicate model performance, limitations, and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • 8 to 10+ years of professional experience in machine learning, including building and deploying models.
  • Strong proficiency in Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras).
  • Experience designing end-to-end ML workflows, from feature extraction to deployment.
  • Solid knowledge of ML algorithms, evaluation metrics, and optimization techniques.
  • Hands-on experience with SQL and big data tools (Spark, PySpark).
  • Familiarity with ML lifecycle tools (MLflow, Weights & Biases, DVC, Git).
  • Strong track record of mentorship and technical leadership.

Preferred Qualifications (Good to Have)

  • Experience with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex, Azure ML).
  • Exposure to deploying ML models as APIs (FastAPI, Flask).
  • Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Contributions to open-source ML projects or publications.

What We Offer

  • A part-time, flexible role with high impact (20 hours/week).
  • The opportunity to both build and mentor  shaping the foundation of our ML team.

title: Sr. Business Analyst
jobDescription:
Job Title: Sr. Business Analyst
Company: Signity Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
Location: Mohali, Punjab


About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Business Analyst who thrives at the intersection of business, technology, and product innovation. This is a post-sales leadership role where you'll act as the Product Owner for client-facing software and AI projects, driving delivery with clarity, purpose, and documentation excellence.


While the focus will be on post-sales ownership, you should be open to participating in pre-sales discovery calls to ensure seamless transitions and a consultative approach to new client engagements.


If you're passionate about building cutting-edge solutions, using AI tools to elevate your documentation game, and want to work in a team where innovation and execution go hand-in-hand ,were excited to connect with you.


Key Responsibilities

Business Analysis & Product Ownership

  • Own the product vision, roadmap, and client alignment post-sale.
  • Gather, analyze, and translate business requirements into functional specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
  • Act as a bridge between clients, designers, developers, and QA teams ensuring a shared understanding.
  • Create detailed BRDs, user journeys, wireframes, workflows, and epics using modern tools.
  • Lead backlog grooming, sprint planning, and work prioritisation in Agile teams.

Stakeholder Communication

  • Maintain transparent communication with internal and external stakeholders across project lifecycles.
  • Present product updates, demos, and roadmap milestones to clients.
  • Facilitate workshops, brainstorming sessions, and validation meetings with business users and technical teams.

Documentation Excellence

  • Deliver high-quality, structured documentation including:
    • Business Requirement Documents (BRD)
    • Functional Specification Documents (FSD)
    • User Manuals / Training Material
    • Executive Summaries & Presentations
  • Use AI-powered writing and productivity tools (like Notion AI, ChatGPT, Scribe, Grammarly, etc.) to fast-track documentation and insights.

Pre-Sales Support (as needed)

  • Join discovery sessions to understand client pain points.
  • Support proposal creation with flow diagrams, mockups, and solution documents.
  • Collaborate with Sales & Tech teams to scope deliverables and timelines.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

  • Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Business, or a related field.
  • MBA or related certifications (CBAP, PMI-PBA) are a plus.

Experience

  • 5+ years of experience in an IT services or software product company.
  • Demonstrated success in client-facing, post-sales roles (preferably with Agile teams).
  • Prior experience working on AI/ML or data-heavy platforms is a strong advantage.

Tools & Technical Knowledge

  • Strong understanding of Agile (Scrum/Kanban) delivery models.
  • Hands-on with tools like JIRA, Confluence, Miro, Lucidchart, MS Visio.
  • Proficient in Office 365/Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides).
  • Familiarity with APIs, SaaS, and basic technical architecture is preferred.
  • Experience with AI tools for documentation, note-taking, or flow creation is highly desirable.

Soft Skills

  • Exceptional written and verbal communication.
  • Strong stakeholder management and conflict resolution abilities.
  • High attention to detail with structured thinking.
  • Proactive, organized, and deadline-driven with a problem-solving mindset.

Why Join Us?

  • Work on next-gen AI-led digital transformation projects.
  • Collaborate directly with founders, CTOs, and senior product leaders.
  • Accelerate your career in an innovation-first company culture..

Apply Now if youre ready to be more than just a Business Analyst and want to shape impactful digital products from vision to delivery.

Job Profile:

Experienced Data Engineer with a strong foundation in designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and architectures. Skilled in transforming raw data into clean, structured formats for analytics and business intelligence. Proficient in modern data tools and technologies such as SQL, T-SQL, Python, Databricks, and cloud platforms (Azure). Adept at data wrangling, modeling, ETL/ELT development, and ensuring data quality, integrity, and security. Collaborative team player with a track record of enabling data-driven decision-making across business units.

As a Data engineer, Candidate will work on the assignments for one of our Utilities clients. Collaborating with cross-functional teams and stakeholders involves gathering data requirements, aligning business goals, and translating them into scalable data solutions. The role includes working closely with data analysts, scientists, and business users to understand needs, designing robust data pipelines, and ensuring data is accessible, reliable, and well-documented. Regular communication, iterative feedback, and joint problem-solving are key to delivering high-impact, data-driven outcomes that support organizational objectives.

This position requires a proven track record of transforming processes, driving customer value, cost savings with experience in running end-to-end analytics for large-scale organizations.

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines to support analytics, reporting, and advanced modeling needs.
  • Collaborate with consultants, analysts, and clients to understand data requirements and translate them into effective data solutions.
  • Ensure data accuracy, quality, and integrity through validation, cleansing, and transformation processes.
  • Develop and optimize data models, ETL workflows, and database architectures across cloud and on-premises environments.
  • Support data-driven decision-making by delivering reliable, well-structured datasets and enabling self-service analytics.
  • Provides seamless integration with cloud platforms (Azure), making it easy to build and deploy end-to-end data pipelines in the cloud
  • Scalable clusters for handling large datasets and complex computations in Databricks, optimizing performance and cost management.

Must to have

  1. Client Engagement Experience and collaboration with cross-functional teams
  2. Data Engineering background in Databricks
  3. Capable of working effectively as an individual contributor or in collaborative team environments
  4. Effective communication and thought leadership with proven record.

Candidate Profile:

  • 3+ years experience must be in Data engineering.
  • Hands on experience on SQL, Python, Databricks, cloud Platform like Azure etc.
  • Prior experience in managing and delivering end to end projects
  • Outstanding written and verbal communication skills
  • Able to work in fast pace continuously evolving environment and ready to take up uphill challenges
  • Is able to understand cross cultural differences and can work with clients across the globe.

title: Azure Data Engineer/Lead Azure Data Engineer
jobDescription:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Azure Data Engineer to join our data engineering team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse or Microsoft Fabric, and strong programming skills in Python or PySpark. Proficiency in SQL and experience in designing and maintaining modern data pipelines and data lakes is essential.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and manage scalable data pipelines using Azure Data Factory (ADF).
  • Develop and optimize data transformations using Azure Synapse Analytics or Microsoft Fabric.
  • Write efficient and reusable code in Python or PySpark for data wrangling and processing.
  • Create, maintain, and optimize complex SQL queries and stored procedures.
  • Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, and business stakeholders to understand data needs.
  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and security across pipelines and storage layers.
  • Monitor pipeline performance and troubleshoot data issues in production environments.
  • Participate in architectural discussions and propose scalable, secure data solutions on Azure

Required Skills and Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • 37 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.
  • Strong experience with Azure Data Factory (ADF) for ETL/ELT workflows.
  • Proficiency in Azure Synapse Analytics and/or Microsoft Fabric.
  • Solid coding skills in Python or PySpark for data processing and automation.
  • Advanced knowledge of SQL including writing, optimizing, and troubleshooting queries.
  • Experience with data modeling, data lakes, and data warehouse concepts.
  • Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines in data projects is a plus.
  • Good communication skills and the ability to work in a collaborative, agile team environment.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with Azure DevOps, Git, or other version control tools.
  • Understanding of data governance, security, and compliance within Azure.

title: Data Scientist
jobDescription:
Role Overview

As a Junior Data Scientist in the Data & AI Delivery team, you will work closely with senior data scientists and delivery leads to design, develop, and deploy AI/ML solutions that address real-world business problems. This role is ideal for candidates who are passionate about data science, eager to learn cutting-edge AI technologies, and ready to grow into a future technical leader.

Key Responsibilities

Solution Development & Implementation

  • Assist in building end-to-end data science workflows including data ingestion, preprocessing, modeling, and deployment.
  • Assist in deploying models into applications via APIs for real-world use cases
  • Develop, test, and validate machine learning models under guidance from senior team members.
  • Support integration of AI/ML models into business applications and existing platforms.

Data Manipulation & Analysis

  • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA), feature engineering, and data cleaning using Python, SQL
  • Work with big data processing frameworks such as Spark/Hadoop in real project settings.

Generative AI & Advanced ML (Exposure & Learning)

  • Gain exposure to Generative AI (e.g., GPT, Hugging Face Transformers) and contribute to fine-tuning and experimentation tasks.
  • Participate in pilots involving GenAI for text generation, conversational AI, and content automation.

MLOps & Deployment Support

  • Learn and assist in deploying ML models using MLOps pipelines and tools (MLflow, TFX, Kubeflow).
  • Help monitor model performance, track metrics, and troubleshoot issues in production.
  • Possess hands-on exposure to Kubernetes for orchestrating and managing AI workloads.

Collaboration & Documentation

  • Work alongside senior data scientists, engineers, and business stakeholders to understand requirements.
  • Document workflows, experiments, and project outcomes for knowledge sharing and reusability.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Strong programming foundation in Python (R/Scala is a plus).
  • Good understanding of machine learning concepts and libraries (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch).
  • Hands-on experience with SQL and data wrangling.
  • Familiarity with APIs (REST/GraphQL) for integrating ML models.
  • Basic understanding or exposure to Kubernetes and Docker.
  • Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) in projects/internships.
  • Curiosity and eagerness to learn advanced areas such as MLOps, Big Data, and Generative AI.

Preferred Background

  • Bachelors/Master’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or related field.
  • Strong experience in building genAI applications
  • Internship, project work, or Kaggle/competition experience in ML/AI.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a collaborative mindset.

What We Offer

  • Mentorship from senior Data & AI leaders.
  • Hands-on experience with APIs, Kubernetes, and cloud-native AI deployments.
  • Exposure to enterprise-grade ML/AI and Generative AI solutions.
  • Platforms to contribute to thought leadership through knowledge sharing, innovation showcases, and community engagement.
  • A clear learning path towards Data Scientist / MLOps Engineer / AI Specialist roles.Role & responsibilities

title: Manager, Data Engineering
jobDescription:
Per Company Description


Assent is the leading solution for supply chain sustainability tailored for the worlds top-tier, sustainability-driven manufacturers. Hidden risks riddle supply chains, many of which weren't built with sustainability in mind. That's where we step in. With insights from experts, Assent is the tool manufacturers trust for comprehensive sustainability.

We are proud to announce that Assent has crossed the US$100M ARR milestone, granting us Centaur Status. This accomplishment, reached just 8 years following our Series A, makes us the first and only Certified B Corporation in North America's SaaS sustainability industry to celebrate this milestone.

Our journey from $5 million to US$100M ARR in just eight years has been marked by significant growth and achievements. With our $350 million US funding led by Vista Equity Partners, we're poised for even greater expansion and are on the lookout for outstanding team members to join our mission.


Hybrid Work Model

At Assent, we proudly embrace a remote-first work model, valuing the flexibility and autonomy it provides our team. We also acknowledge the intangible benefits of occasional in-person workdays. For team members situated within 50 kms/31 miles of our five global offices in Ottawa, Eldoret, Penang, Columbus, Pune and Amsterdam, you can expect to come into the office at least one day a week. Similarly, those near our co-working spaces in Nairobi and Toronto are encouraged to work onsite once a month.


Position Overview

We’re seeking a Manager – Data Engineering to lead our growing data engineering team based in Pune. This leadership role will focus on building scalable, secure, and high-performance data platforms, pipelines, and products for our global, multi-tenant SaaS applications.

You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Product, Architecture, UX, QA, and DevOps to deliver robust data solutions that power Assent's products and reporting systems — especially in the areas of ETL pipelines, cloud-native data warehousing, and unstructured data lakes.

Key Responsibilities

Team Leadership & Development

  • Lead, mentor, and retain a high-performing team of data engineers
  • Conduct regular 1:1s, performance reviews, and growth planning
  • Foster a collaborative team culture and instill best practices

Project & Delivery Management

  • Drive delivery of data solutions aligned with sprint and release goals
  • Ensure on-time delivery, high code quality, and scalability
  • Facilitate agile ceremonies: sprint planning, retrospectives, and stand-ups

Technical Execution & Architecture

  • Architect and guide the development of scalable ETL/ELT pipelines
  • Build and maintain data lake solutions using AWS tools to manage unstructured and semi-structured data
  • Work with large-scale datasets from diverse sources including APIs, logs, files, and internal systems
  • Optimize performance, security, and maintainability of data pipelines
  • Promote usage of tools such as Snowflake, dbt, Python, and SQL

Data Governance & Best Practices

  • Ensure adherence to internal coding standards and data security guidelines
  • Implement best practices for data modeling, quality checks, and documentation
  • Collaborate with architecture and infrastructure teams on cloud cost optimization and performance

Required Skills & Experience

  • 12- 15 years in Data Engineering, Data Architecture, or similar roles
  • Minimum 3 years in a leadership or managerial capacity
  • Proven experience building robust ETL pipelines, preferably for multi-tenant SaaS platforms
  • Strong technical hands-on expertise with:
    • AWS Services: S3, Glue, Lambda, Redshift, EMR
    • Data Platforms: Snowflake, dbt
    • Programming: Python, SQL
    • Unstructured Data Handling: Data lakes, JSON, XML, log data
  • Expertise in SQL-based data warehousing and RDBMS systems
  • Knowledge of CI/CD, version control (GitHub), and Agile/Scrum methodologies
  • Ability to balance technical depth with stakeholder communication and delivery tracking
  • Understanding of modern lakehouse architecture and tools like Apache Hudi, Iceberg, or Delta Lake.

Good to Have

  • Experience in product-based companies (SaaS, ESG, Supply Chain domains preferred)
  • Familiarity with data security standards (e.g., GDPR, SOC2)
  • Experience with orchestration tools (Airflow, Step Functions), data cataloging, or cost optimization

Benefits & Perks at Assent

Work-Life Flexibility

  • Hybrid work model – 1 day/week in our Pune office
  • Flexible work hours, generous leave policy, and wellness days

Financial Well-being

  • Competitive base salary + annual bonus
  • Retirement savings plans and financial planning resources

Health & Wellness

  • Medical insurance for you and dependents
  • Life leave for major personal moments or mental wellness

Learning & Growth

  • Learning days, access to global mentorship programs
  • Certifications, online courses, and internal mobility opportunities

Diversity & Inclusion

  • Active DEI Employee Resource Groups
  • Inclusive hiring practices and equitable career progression

title: Azure Devops Engineer
jobDescription:
We are CirrusLabs . Our vision is to become the world's most sought-after niche digital transformation company that helps customers realize value through innovation. Our mission is to co-create success with our customers, partners and community. Our goal is to enable employees to dream, grow and make things happen. We are committed to excellence. We are a dependable partner organization that delivers on commitments. We strive to maintain integrity with our employees and customers. Every action we take is driven by value. The core of who we are is through our well-knit teams and employees. You are the core of a values driven organization.

You have an entrepreneurial spirit. You enjoy working as a part of well-knit teams. You value the team over the individual. You welcome diversity at work and within the greater community. You aren't afraid to take risks. You appreciate a growth path with your leadership team that journeys how you can grow inside and outside of the organization. You thrive upon continuing education programs that your company sponsors to strengthen your skills and for you to become a thought leader ahead of the industry curve.

You are excited about creating change because your skills can help the greater good of every customer, industry and community. We are hiring a talented Azure DevOps Engineer - Mid Level to join our team. If you're excited to be part of a winning team, CirrusLabs ( http://www.cirruslabs.io ) is a great place to grow your career.

Experience - 3+ years
Location - Hyderabad

Position Summary

We are building a dedicated Azure DevOps engineering team to support a Fortune 50 enterprise client through a large-scale digital transformation. This team will design, automate, and optimize Azure-based environments to enable secure, scalable, and efficient DevOps pipelines across the enterprise.

As part of this high-impact initiative, you will contribute your expertise in Azure Cloud and DevOps practices while collaborating with architects, developers, and stakeholders across the client's IT organization. Each team member will bring mid-to-senior-level strengths in core Azure DevOps engineering while also contributing in one or more complementary skill areas such as Infrastructure as Code (IaC), automation, containerization, or GitHub/AI-enhanced DevOps.

This is a chance to join a transformational program and grow your career while shaping the future of DevOps at one of the world's largest enterprises.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and optimize CI/CD pipelines within Azure DevOps.
  • Develop Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solutions using ARM templates, Terraform, Bicep, or JSON.
  • Automate provisioning and configuration with scripting tools (PowerShell, Azure Automation).
  • Support secure and scalable Azure environments, including containerized workloads (AKS, Docker).
  • Collaborate with developers, architects, and operations teams to enable cloud-native delivery practices.
  • Troubleshoot, monitor, and enhance cloud infrastructure and DevOps workflows.
  • Engage with enterprise stakeholders to ensure DevOps practices align with governance and business objectives.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Proven hands-on experience with Azure Cloud and the Azure DevOps ecosystem (Repos, Pipelines, Artifacts).
  • Mid-to-senior-level expertise in at least one of the following areas:
  • Infrastructure as Code (ARM, Terraform, Bicep, JSON)
  • Automation scripting (PowerShell, Azure Automation)
  • CI/CD pipeline design, release management, and workflow optimization
  • Containerization/orchestration (AKS, Docker, Kubernetes)
  • Strong communication skills and ability to work with enterprise stakeholders in a collaborative environment.

Preferred / Nice-to-Have Skills

  • Experience with GitHub Actions for automation and CI/CD workflows.
  • Exposure to Generative AI (GenAI) tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Azure OpenAI, ChatGPT Enterprise) for code generation, testing, and pipeline enhancements.
  • Familiarity with LLM Ops, AI observability, or AI-powered DevOps practices.

Why Work With Us

  • Join a transformational DevOps team delivering enterprise-scale solutions on Azure.
  • Be part of a trusted consultancy driving high-impact outcomes for one of the world's leading IT organizations.
  • Contribute your strengths while expanding into new areas like cloud automation, containerization, or AI-driven DevOps.
  • Collaborative team environment with opportunities to learn from peers and work across global delivery teams.

title: Senior Software Engineer- Vadodara- Immediate Joiners
jobDescription:
Job Title: Senior Software Engineer Legacy System Migration & Cross-Platform Development

Location: Vadodara

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with strong expertise in Windows and Linux-based application development, legacy system migration, and device driver development. The ideal candidate will lead the transition of legacy Windows XP-based embedded systems to modern platforms (Windows 11/Linux), ensuring compatibility with new hardware interfaces such as Thunderbolt and FireWire.

Key Responsibilities

  • Reverse engineer legacy Windows applications and hardware communication layers.
  • Migrate and modernize applications from Windows XP to Windows 11 and/or Linux.
  • Design and implement cross-platform software solutions compatible with modern motherboards.
  • Develop and debug Linux device drivers and system-level components.
  • Collaborate with embedded hardware teams to ensure seamless hardware-software integration.
  • Document migration strategies and maintain traceability of features.
  • Support system testing, validation, and deployment.

Required Technical Skills

Software Development

  • Strong programming skills in C, C++ (Assembly optional).
  • Experience with Windows (XP/7/10/11) and Linux application development.
  • Familiarity with reverse engineering tools (IDA Pro, Ghidra).
  • Proficient in Visual Studio, Git, and debugging tools (WinDbg, Process Explorer, Driver Verifier).

Driver & Kernel-Level Development

  • Hands-on experience with Linux device driver development.
  • System-level programming and debugging expertise.

Hardware Interfaces

  • Experience with PCIe, USB, Serial, and custom I/O buses.
  • Familiarity with FireWire (IEEE 1394) and Thunderbolt (USB-C/PCIe).
  • Ability to work with oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, multimeters, and interpret schematics/datasheets.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in industrial control systems, automation, or embedded firmware.
  • Exposure to virtualization/emulation environments.
  • Knowledge of hardware abstraction layers and low-level system integration.

title: Aws Devops Engineer
jobDescription:
Job Title: DevOps Engineer (AWS, Kubernetes, GitOps)

Job Summary:

We're seeking an experienced DevOps Engineer to join our team, with expertise in AWS, Kubernetes, GitOps, and CI/CD pipelines. The ideal candidate will have experience with containerization, observability stacks, and automation scripting, and will be able to work in an agile team environment.

Key Responsibilities:

1. L2/L3 Support: Provide support for CI/CD pipelines, deployment tools, and production environments, ensuring optimal performance and availability.

2. AWS Resource Management: Manage and maintain AWS resources, including EKS clusters, RDS, ElastiCache, and OpenSearch, to ensure seamless deployments and operational stability.

3. GitOps and CI/CD: Implement and manage GitOps-based deployments using ArgoCD, and automate build, testing, and deployment processes using GitLab pipelines.

4. Troubleshooting and Resolution: Proactively troubleshoot and resolve issues across development, QA, and production environments, ensuring timely resolution and minimal disruption.

5. Automation Scripting: Develop and maintain automation scripts using Shell and Python to streamline operational tasks and improve efficiency.

6. Collaboration and Best Practices: Collaborate with architects and senior developers, contributing to technical design discussions and influencing architectural decisions, and implement and promote best practices for building scalable, high-performance, and maintainable microservices architectures.

7. Security and Compliance: Integrate security and compliance checks into the DevOps process, ensuring adherence to security best practices and regulatory requirements.

8. Agile/Scrum Environment: Participate actively in an Agile/Scrum development environment, including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives, and contribute to sprint goals and deliver software increments on schedule.

Required Skills:

1. AWS Expertise: Proficiency in AWS services like VPC, EC2, EKS, S3, RDS, and Terraform.

2. Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills: Strong analytical skills, experience with debugging tools, and a systematic approach to problem-solving.

3. GitOps and CI/CD: Experience with ArgoCD, Helm, Kustomize, and GitOps-based deployments.

4. Containerization: Strong understanding of containerization using Kubernetes and Docker.

5. Observability: Experience with configuring observability stacks like Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK.

Nice-to-Have:

1. Strong Communication Skills: Ability to effectively communicate technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

2. Creative Problem-Solving: Ability to analyze complex problems, develop creative solutions, and make informed decisions.

3. Teamwork and Relationship Building: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams and build strong relationships.

4. Adaptability and Prioritization: Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment, prioritize tasks, and produce high-quality work with a focus on accuracy and precision.

We're building a team of talented developers who are passionate about building products that solve real-world problems.   • You are a strong communicator who can interact confidently with both internal teams and external clients.
  • You are enterprising, proactive, and enthusiastic, always looking for ways to improve systems and workflows.

Our hiring process will have 5 stages: 1 screening call & 3 technical interviews, and a culture-fit interview. title: Cloud Engineering Lead - Kubernetes
jobDescription:
Cloud Engineering Lead

This role will involve managing and scaling Docker and Kubernetes infrastructure, designing and implementing cloud architectures, and leading containerization and infrastructure automation across various projects. You will work with a broader set of DevOps and CNCF tools, applying deep expertise in CI/CD, security, and infrastructure-as-code to support high-availability applications across diverse cloud environments.

What Youll Do:

  • Design, implement, and manage Kubernetes clusters (EKS) across AWS environments, maintaining secure, scalable, and resilient solutions.
  • Lead the development and automation of CI/CD pipelines using tools such as ArgoCD, Cilium, TeamCity, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy, and CodePipeline to streamline application deployment and configuration.
  • Expertly manage cloud resources using Terraform, and develop reusable, version-controlled IaC modules, promoting modular, scalable infrastructure deployment.
  • Strong understanding and experience with Helm charts, and CNCF applications such as Cilium, Karpenter, and Prometheus.
  • Configure and optimize Kubernetes clusters, ensuring compliance with container security standards.
  • Oversee Docker image creation, tagging, and management, including maintaining secure, efficient Docker repositories (ECR, JFrog).
  • Utilize monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk, Cloudwatch Container Insight) to ensure system performance, detect issues, and proactively address performance concerns.
  • Act as an escalation point for critical issues, conduct root cause analyses and maintain SOPs and documentation for efficient incident response and knowledge sharing.
  • Provide training, mentorship, and technical guidance to junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning within the CCoE team.

What Youll Bring:

  • BE/B.Tech or higher in CS, IT or EE
  • Hand-on experience of 7-8yrs in delivering container-based deployments using Docker and Kubernetes
  • Good exposure in writing Helm Charts and configuring Kubernetes CI/CD pipelines
  • Experience in writing manifest files for Deployment, Service, Pod, Daemon Sets, Persistent Volume (PV), Persistent Volume Claim (PVC), Storage, Namespaces
  • Hand-on experience in delivering container-based deployments using Docker and Kubernetes
  • Experience in Cloud, DevOps, and Linux and Experience in DevOps Tools like Git, Helm, Terraform, Docker, and Kubernetes
  • Strong hands-on experience in Python, Yaml, or similar languages.
  • Build and deploy Docker containers to break up monolithic apps into microservices, improving developer workflow
  • Strong understanding of container security and relevant tool experience like Sysdig, CrowdStrike, etc
  • Strong knowledge of container performance monitoring and scaling policies
  • Deep Linux knowledge with an understanding of the container ecosystem
  • Good Experience to develop images using Docker container Technology

Should have good communication skills and a can-do attitude

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Senior Cloud Engineerwith expertise in Azure and DevOps(CICD), and secondary skills in Terraform, Python and Kubernetes to join our team. As a key member of our DevOps team, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining the infrastructure and deployment pipelines for our cloud-based applications and services on the Azure platform. Your deep knowledge of Azure services will be instrumental in automating infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and deployment processes to ensure scalability, reliability, and security of our cloud environments.

What youll do:

  • Assist in deploying, managing, and troubleshooting Azure resources, including virtual machines, networking, and storage.
  • Manage Azure networking services such as private endpoints, load balancers, Application Gateway, and ExpressRoute to ensure secure and efficient connectivity.
  • Configure and manage Azure services such as Database, Function APPs, Vnet, IAM, and ARM Template.
  • Administer Azure governance features, including management groups, Azure Policy, and cost management.
  • Create and manage Service Principals for secure access to Azure resources, and implement role-based access control (RBAC) policies
  • Develop and maintain Kubernetes clusters on AZURE EKSfor deploying and managing containerized applications, implementing best practices for cluster management, including scaling, upgrades, and security.
  • Containerize applications using Dockerto ensure consistency across development, testing, and production environments, developing and maintaining Dockerfiles and Docker Compose configurations for multi-container applications.
  • Develop and maintain infrastructure as code (IaC) templates using Terraform to provision and manage AZURE resources.
  • Implement best practices for modularization, reusability, and version control of Terraform configurations.
  • Architect scalable, cost-effective, and resilient AZURE infrastructure solutions to support our applications and services.
  • Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, or AZURE DevOps to automate build, test, and deployment processes.
  • Implement security best practices and compliance standards (e.g., CIS benchmarks, GDPR, HIPAA) in AZURE environments.
  • Stay updated on Azure services, features, and best practices, and provide recommendations for improving our Azure infrastructure.
  • Optimize AZURE infrastructure for cost efficiency by rightsizing resources, implementing auto-scaling, and leveraging AZURE cost management tools.
  • Monitor AZURE usage and spending, identify cost-saving opportunities, and implement cost optimization strategies.
  • Act as an escalation point for critical issues, conduct root cause analyses and maintain SOPs and documentation for efficient incident response and knowledge sharing.
  • Provide training, mentorship, and technical guidance to junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning within the team.

What youll bring:

  • Bachelors degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.
  • 6+ years of experience of working as a DevOps Engineer with a focus on AZURE cloud platform.
  • Strong proficiency in Kubernetes and secondary skills in Terraform for infrastructure provisioning and management.
  • In-depth knowledge of AZURE services and their configuration, including Database, Function APPs, Vnet, IAM, and ARM Template.
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools like Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, or AZURE DevOps.
  • Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker.
  • Solid understanding of networking concepts, security principles, and best practices in AZURE environments.
  • Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills with the ability to debug complex issues in cloud infrastructure.
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment.
  • Comfortable working in rotational shifts
  • Ability to quickly learn new platforms, languages, tools, and techniques as needed to meet project requirements.
  • Self-motivated and directed, with strong attention to detail.
  • Certification on Terraform / AZURE certified is a plus.

title: Business Analyst/ Collection Analyst
jobDescription:
About Moneyview


Moneyviews mission is to provide world-class financial products to every deserving Indian having a Smartphone and help them succeed. The Moneyview App offers a full suite of personalized credit products such as instant personal loans, cards, BNPL products, and personal financial management solutions. Our proprietary data models provide a 360-degree risk assessment, enabling credit for the underserved segments.
This opening is in the Credit Risk and Analytics team. We are a market leader in the online/instant personal loan space, providing loans of up to Rs.10 Lakhs through a completely digital platform. Our unique IP assesses creditworthiness using multiple data sources and does not rely only on the bureau score, thus offering better approval rates and loan amounts. Our easy-to-use App makes the documentation process simple, providing the loan offer in less than 2 mins and disbursal within 24hrs! Our app has over 10M+ downloads and is one of the few highest-rated apps in the category with 4.5+ ratings.
Moneyview is an established organization, founded 10+ years ago and is funded by marquee investors including Tiger Global, Accel, and Ribbit Capital. We provide loans in partnership with NBFCs and Banks. Money view is also a founding member of DLAI - Digital Lenders Association of India - a widely recognized body for Fintech companies in India.
Qualification Criteria
Exp: 1+ years
Business analysts/risk analysts preferably from financial services, large banks/MNCs.
Demonstrated problem solving abilities and first principles based thinking
Ability to identify key drivers of business and create KPIs for the same
Power user of Excel, knowledge of SQL
Operational excellence with stakeholder management skills
Preferred background in collections
Hands on experience in R or Python, added advantage
Ability to work both independently and with direction to meet established deadlines and objectives

Responsibilities:
In this role you will work closely with the business leads to:

  • Describe: Identify the key metrics that should be tracked & set-up dashboards for the same
  • Diagnose: Identify problem points for collections
  • Prescribe: Coordinate with different partners to ensure smooth repayment and collections process

Your day-day will involve making data driven decisions by:

  • Performing analysis to identify late payment businesses
  • Quantifying and proposing risk/reward trade-offs of recommendations
  • Set up recurring calls to understand issues with re-payments
  • Applying knowledge of business and balanced judgment in interpretation of data
  • Performing ad hoc analysis and quickly provide results and recommendations
  • Engaging in a culture of Diversity and Inclusion

title: Big Data Engineer
jobDescription:
Job Overview: We are seeking an experienced and motivated Big Data Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in Python, PySpark, SQL, Hive, and cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure. As a Big Data Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining large-scale data processing systems to support our data analytics and business intelligence initiatives.
Key Responsibilities:

  • Data Architecture & Design: Design and implement scalable data architectures, pipelines, and workflows to handle large volumes of structured and unstructured data.
  • Big Data Processing: Develop and maintain data processing frameworks using PySpark to handle real-time and batch processing needs.
  • Database Management: Write efficient SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, and analysis. Manage and optimize Hive tables and queries.
  • Cloud Integration: Utilize AWS or Azure services (such as S3, Redshift, Azure Data Lake, Azure SQL) for data storage, processing, and analytics. Ensure data security and compliance with best practices.
  • Data Quality & Optimization: Implement data validation and quality checks to ensure accuracy and consistency. Optimize data processing workflows for performance and cost-efficiency.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with data scientists, analysts, and other engineering teams to understand data requirements and deliver solutions that meet business needs.
  • Troubleshooting: Diagnose and resolve data processing issues, ensuring minimal downtime and disruption to data workflows.
  • Documentation: Maintain clear and comprehensive documentation of data pipelines, processes, and systems.

Required Qualifications:

  • Education: Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field. Masters degree is a plus.
  • Experience: 3+ years of experience as a Big Data Engineer or in a similar role with a proven track record of working on large-scale data projects.
  • Technical Skills:
    • Proficiency in Python Coding for data manipulation and processing.
    • Strong experience with PySpark for distributed data processing.
    • Advanced SQL Coding skills for querying and managing relational databases.
    • Experience with Hive for data warehousing and querying.
    • Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS or Azure) and their data services.

Note : This is completely Work From Office and 1 PM to 10 PM

Data Engineer

Software Engineer (Data)

What are we looking for?

  • Role models. Leading by example and setting direction on engineering practices and habits are core to our mission.
  • Problem solvers. We pursue some of the most challenging cross-cutting problems/issues and treat them as opportunities to align and shape our culture.
  • Change agents. We acknowledge that we might not always understand a particular domain; however, we will ask probing questions and many times will leverage data to drive decision making or challenge the status quo.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
jobDescription:
Company Profile: Countronics

  • Founded: 1978
  • Headquarters: Sahibabad Industrial Area, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
  • Website: www.countronics.com
  • Business: Design, manufacture, and export of industrial process control & measuring instruments (e.g. temperature indicators, data loggers, conductivity/ORP meters, etc.)
  • Quality Standards: ISO 9001 certified (ISO 9001-2015)
  • Market Position: A well-known name in India for electronic control/instrumentation in industrial segments, with export reach.
  • Vision / Strengths: Emphasis on precision, reliability, innovation, and custom solutions for industrial control systems.
  • Location & Reach: Products used across process industries; ability to customize control instruments.

Job Title: Embedded Software Engineer

Experience: ~1 Year (Embedded software development)

Location: Ghaziabad / Countronics facilities


Job Summary:

Join Countronics as an Embedded Software Engineer with around 1 year of experience. You will help develop firmware and embedded solutions for industrial instrumentation products. Youll work with microcontrollers (Microchip, STM32), design HMIs, and support IoT integration, contributing to the companys mission of building precise and reliable control instruments.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain firmware for Microchip and STM32 microcontrollerbased systems.
  • Design and integrate HMI interfaces (e.g. DWIN displays) for instrumentation and control panels.
  • Implement and maintain communication protocols: UART, SPI, I2C, RS485, Modbus, CAN.
  • Work on IoT-based applications, including connectivity, cloud interfacing, data transmission, remote monitoring.
  • Conduct debugging and hardware-software integration (using JTAG, logic analyzers, oscilloscopes).
  • Assist in testing, validation, and calibration of control systems.
  • Produce clear documentation for designs, firmware, integration steps, and test results.
  • Cooperate with hardware, mechanical, and R&D teams to bring-up new products.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

  • Proficiency in Embedded C / C++.
  • Experience working with Microchip (PIC/AVR) and STM32 microcontrollers.
  • Experience or familiarity with HMI design/integration, especially DWIN or similar displays.
  • Understanding of industrial communication protocols (RS485, Modbus, CAN, etc.).
  • Exposure to IoT / connectivity (WiFi, Ethernet, MQTT, cloud).
  • Knowledge of RTOS or bare-metal firmware development.
  • Experience with debugging tools and hardware bring-up.
  • Basic version control experience (Git).

Preferred / Nice-to-Have:

  • Experience with PLC / SCADA systems or ability to interface with them.
  • Knowledge of industrial wireless protocols (e.g. LoRa, NB-IoT).
  • Understanding of industrial safety, reliability, and quality standards.
  • Previous experience in instrumentation, control, or measurement domains.

title: Business Analyst
jobDescription:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented Business Analyst with experience in software development projects to bridge the gap between business requirements and technical execution. The ideal candidate will work closely with stakeholders, clients, and development teams to gather requirements, define functional specifications, and ensure successful delivery of technology solutions.


Key Responsibilities:


Requirement Gathering & Analysis

  • Work with internal and external stakeholders to elicit, analyze, and document business requirements.
  • Translate business needs into detailed functional and technical specifications.
  • Conduct stakeholder interviews, workshops, and requirement analysis sessions.

Project Documentation

  • Create user stories, use cases, process flows, wireframes, and Business Requirement Documents (BRDs).
  • Maintain and update product backlog in collaboration with product owners or project managers.

Stakeholder Communication

  • Act as a liaison between clients, users, and development teams to ensure requirements are clearly understood and implemented.
  • Facilitate review and approval of requirements and project deliverables.

Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) Support

  • Collaborate with UI/UX designers, developers, and QA teams to ensure alignment with requirements.
  • Participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, demos, and retrospectives (Agile/Scrum environments).
  • Support UAT (User Acceptance Testing) by creating test scenarios and coordinating feedback.

Continuous Improvement

  • Identify process improvement opportunities and contribute to product and process enhancements.
  • Monitor project progress and proactively identify potential risks or delays.

Requirements:

  • 1-4 years of experience as a Business Analyst in software development projects.
  • Strong understanding of Agile and Waterfall methodologies.
  • Experience with tools such as JIRA, Confluence, Trello, Figma, Lucidchart, or similar.

title: Senior Technical Lead - Data Engineer
jobDescription:
C1X AdTech Pvt Ltd is a fast-growing, product and engineering-driven AdTech company building next-generation advertising and marketing technology platforms. Our mission is to empower enterprise clients with the smartest marketing solutions, enabling seamless integration with personalization engines and delivering cross-channel marketing capabilities. We are dedicated to enhancing customer engagement and experiences while focusing on increasing Lifetime Value (LTV) through consistent messaging across all channels.

Our engineering team spans front end (UI), back end (Java/Node.js APIs), Big Data, and DevOps, working together to deliver scalable, high-performance products for the digital advertising ecosystem.

Role Overview

As a Senior Technical Lead Data Engineer, you will play a dual role as a hands-on contributor and team leader. You will architect, build, and scale data platforms and pipelines that power our AdTech ecosystem. In addition, you will mentor junior engineers, enforce best practices, and collaborate across functions to ensure high-quality, high-performance data systems.

You will be responsible for driving the next generation of our analytics and data infrastructure by leveraging modern big data and cloud technologies.

Objectives

  • Define and implement scalable data strategies that meet product and business needs.

  • Design and optimize data pipelines for batch and real-time use cases.

  • Act as a player-coach – balancing leadership, mentorship, and hands-on coding.

  • Ensure the reliability, quality, and governance of data assets across the organization.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enable data-driven insights and product innovation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Architect, build, and optimize large-scale batch and streaming pipelines using frameworks like Apache Spark on AWS/GCP.

  • Design, manage, and automate data flows across multiple sources and destinations.

  • Define and enforce data quality, reliability, and governance standards.

  • Drive best practices for CI/CD, testing, and automation in data engineering workflows.

  • Mentor and guide a team of data engineers while contributing as an individual contributor.

  • Work with product managers, analysts, and business stakeholders to translate business needs into data solutions.

  • Optimize the scalability, performance, and cost-effectiveness of data systems.

  • Stay up to date with emerging data technologies and recommend adoption where beneficial.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (exceptional coding performance on platforms like LeetCode/HackerRank may substitute).

  • 6–10 years of data engineering experience, with at least 2–3 years in a lead/mentorship role.

  • Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and system design.

  • Proficiency in at least two programming languages – Python or Scala preferred.

  • Expertise in big data frameworks: Spark, MapReduce, Hadoop, Hive, Sqoop, HDFS, Airflow, Zookeeper.

  • Experience with cloud platforms – AWS (EMR, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB) or GCP equivalents.

  • Hands-on with Databricks Notebooks and Jobs API.

  • Strong knowledge of SQL (RDBMS + NoSQL: Postgres, MySQL, Redshift, Redis) with query optimization and schema design.

  • Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and workflow orchestration (Airflow, Luigi).

  • Proficient in Git and collaborative development workflows.

  • Strong communication and problem-solving skills, with the ability to act as a player-coach (individual contributor + team lead).

Role Details

  • Role: Senior Technical Lead – Data Engineer

  • Industry Type: Software Product (AdTech / MarTech)

  • Department: Engineering – Data & Software

  • Employment Type: Full Time, Permanent

  • Role Category: Data Engineering / Software Development
